claimBoundary: This opt-in validation replay changes only the moving-wall density normalization and stops at the historical failure horizon. It does not modify the production default, authorize refinement, apply an experimental-agreement gate, or establish free-flight validity.
scientificVerdict: Candidate A completed the retained D=16 failure horizon with positive finite populations and closed both the near-wing and global force/momentum ledgers. It advances only to the full registered D=16 window.
